name: claude-keep-awake
description: Keeps your computer awake while Claude Code is working, and releases when the turn ends. Cross-platform: Windows, WSL2, macOS, Linux.

plugins.name: keep-awake
plugins.description: Keeps your computer awake while Claude Code is working, and releases when the turn ends. Scoped per session, so it is safe with multiple Claude windows open. Cross-platform via a Node dispatcher (requires Node.js on PATH).
